meta.title: Advanced Passive & Reporting Verbs
meta.description: Learn complex passive structures and sophisticated reporting verbs.
meta.description_ko: 복잡한 수동태 구조와 세련된 보고 동사를 학습합니다.

explanation.en: 'It is believed that S+V' = 'S is believed to + infinitive'. Both are passive reporting structures.
explanation.ko: 'It is believed that S+V' = 'S is believed to + 부정사'. 둘 다 수동 보고 구조입니다.

questions.prompt: 'It is believed that...'와 같은 의미의 구조는?
choices: The subject is believed to + infinitive

explanation.en: 'Is said to + infinitive' = passive reporting structure about a current belief.
explanation.ko: 'is said to + 부정사' = 현재 믿음에 대한 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: The suspect _____ to have fled the country. (용의자는 나라를 떠난 것으로 알려졌습니다.)

explanation.en: 'The economy is expected to...' (passive) = 'Experts expect the economy to...' (active).
explanation.ko: 'The economy is expected to...'(수동) = 'Experts expect the economy to...'(능동).

questions.prompt: 'The economy is expected to recover next year.'의 능동형은?
choices: We are expecting the economy recover.
Experts expect the economy to recover next year.
The economy expects to recover next year.
We expected the economy recovering next year.

explanation.en: 'Is alleged to have + past participle' — passive reporting for an accusation.
explanation.ko: 'is alleged to have + 과거분사' — 혐의에 대한 수동 보고.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The politician is alleged to have accepted bribes.

explanation.en: 'It is considered that' + clause = impersonal passive reporting structure.
explanation.ko: 'it is considered that' + 절 = 비인칭 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: It _____ that the new drug could cure the disease. (새 약이 그 질병을 치료할 수 있을 것으로 여겨집니다.)

explanation.en: 'Rumoured to' = there are rumours that something is the case (unconfirmed).
explanation.ko: 'rumoured to' = ~라는 소문이 있다(확인되지 않음).

questions.prompt: 'The company is rumoured to be planning a merger.'에서 'rumoured to be'의 의미는?

explanation.en: 'Are thought to have + past participle' = passive reporting for a past event.
explanation.ko: 'are thought to have + 과거분사' = 과거 사건에 대한 수동 보고.

questions.prompt: Thousands of people _____ to have been affected by the outbreak. (수천 명이 발병으로 영향을 받은 것으로 추정됩니다.)

explanation.en: Common reporting verbs used in news and academic writing.
explanation.ko: 뉴스와 학술 글쓰기에서 사용하는 일반적인 보고 동사.

questions.prompt: 보고 동사와 의미를 연결하세요.

explanation.en: 'Deny + gerund' = refuse to admit having done something.
explanation.ko: 'deny + 동명사' = 무언가를 했다는 것을 인정하기를 거부하다.

questions.prompt: The CEO _____ having known about the fraud. (CEO는 사기에 대해 알고 있었다는 것을 부인했습니다.)

explanation.en: General fact about current transmission requires present simple passive: 'is transmitted'.
explanation.ko: 현재 전파 방법에 대한 일반적 사실은 현재 단순 수동태: 'is transmitted'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'It is known that the virus transmitted by mosquitoes.'
choices: It is known → It is knowing

explanation.en: 'It is widely accepted that' = strong passive reporting structure used in academic writing.
explanation.ko: 'it is widely accepted that' = 학술 글쓰기에서 쓰는 강한 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: It is widely accepted that a poor diet affects life expectancy.

explanation.en: 'Claimed to have witnessed' = past tense reporting of a past assertion.
explanation.ko: 'claimed to have witnessed' = 과거 주장에 대한 과거 시제 보고.

questions.prompt: She _____ to have witnessed the crime but later changed her story. (그녀는 범죄를 목격했다고 주장했지만 나중에 진술을 바꿨습니다.)

explanation.en: 'Acknowledge' = admit or recognise that something is true.
explanation.ko: 'acknowledge' = 무언가가 사실임을 인정하거나 인식하다.

questions.prompt: 'acknowledge'의 뜻은?

explanation.en: 'Acknowledged that + past perfect' = formally admitted a fault.
explanation.ko: 'acknowledged that + 과거완료' = 공식적으로 잘못을 인정했다.

questions.prompt: The minister _____ that there had been failings in the system. (장관은 시스템에 실패가 있었음을 인정했습니다.)

explanation.en: 'To have + past participle' (perfect infinitive) refers to actions before the reporting time.
explanation.ko: 'to have + 과거분사'(완료 부정사)는 보고 시점 이전의 행동을 가리킵니다.

questions.prompt: 수동 보고 구조에서 'to have + past participle'를 쓰는 이유는?
choices: 보고 동사보다 이전에 일어난 과거 행동을 나타내기 위해

explanation.en: 'Is estimated to + infinitive' = present passive reporting structure.
explanation.ko: 'is estimated to + 부정사' = 현재 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: The ancient city _____ to date back more than 5,000 years. (그 고대 도시는 5,000년 이상 거슬러 올라가는 것으로 추정됩니다.)

explanation.en: 'It is understood that' = a formal passive reporting structure often used in journalism.
explanation.ko: 'it is understood that' = 언론에서 자주 사용하는 격식체 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: It is understood that negotiations are ongoing.

explanation.en: 'Is reported to have + past participle' = passive reporting of past event.
explanation.ko: 'is reported to have + 과거분사' = 과거 사건에 대한 수동 보고.

questions.prompt: The company _____ to have made over $10 million in profit last year. (그 회사는 작년에 천만 달러 이상의 이익을 낸 것으로 보고됩니다.)

explanation.en: 'Concede' = reluctantly admit something is true, often after resistance.
explanation.ko: 'concede' = 종종 저항 후에 마지못해 무언가가 사실임을 인정하다.

questions.prompt: 'concede'의 뜻은?

explanation.en: 'Contend' = strongly assert or argue a position.
explanation.ko: 'contend' = 입장을 강하게 주장하거나 논증하다.

questions.prompt: Scientists _____ that the new findings challenge current theories. (과학자들은 새로운 발견이 현재 이론에 도전한다고 주장합니다.)

explanation.en: 'Expected to + base verb' (infinitive), not 'expected + gerund'.
explanation.ko: 'expected to + 동사 원형'(부정사), 'expected + 동명사'가 아닙니다.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The new law is expected benefiting thousands of families.'
choices: is expected benefiting → is expected to benefit

explanation.en: 'It has been suggested that' = present perfect passive reporting.
explanation.ko: 'it has been suggested that' = 현재 완료 수동 보고.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: It has been suggested that the cause of the fire was electrical.

explanation.en: 'Denied any wrongdoing' = refused to admit guilt.
explanation.ko: 'denied any wrongdoing' = 잘못을 인정하기를 거부했다.

questions.prompt: He _____ any wrongdoing despite the evidence against him. (그에 불리한 증거에도 불구하고 그는 어떤 잘못도 부인했습니다.)

explanation.en: 'Was thought to have been' = past passive reporting of a past state.
explanation.ko: 'was thought to have been' = 과거 상태에 대한 과거 수동 보고.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: What does the report say about the accident? B: The driver _____ to have been distracted at the time.'
